SEARCH
Package dev.quassel.ga.runtime

Class SearchRuntimeService<C,R>

java.lang.Object
dev.quassel.ga.runtime.SearchRuntimeService<C,R>
Type Parameters:
C - candidate type
R - request/specification type
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class SearchRuntimeService<C,R> extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Generic runtime service that executes typed run requests.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description
    SearchRuntimeService(SearchProblem<C,R> problem)
    Creates a runtime service for one problem adapter.

    • SearchRuntimeService

      public SearchRuntimeService(SearchProblem<C,R> problem)
      Creates a runtime service for one problem adapter.
      Parameters:
      problem - domain adapter

  • Method Details

    • start

      public SearchRun<C> start(R request)
      Starts one asynchronous run.
      Parameters:
      request - typed run request
      Returns:
      runtime object for the new run

    • get

      public SearchRun<C> get(String runId)
      Returns a run by ID.
      Parameters:
      runId - unique run ID
      Returns:
      matching run or null

    • list

      public List<SearchRun<C>> list()
      Returns all known runs.
      Returns:
      current runs
